data.title: lemlist New Features: AI-Powered Multichannel Outreach
data.excerpt: Explore lemlist's newest features—AI agents, LinkedIn automation, and dynamic personalization. Discover why teams are switching to smarter outreach.

$media.alt: lemlist New Features: AI-Powered Multichannel Outreach

children.text: Why Outreach Tools Need to Evolve Right Now
Let's be honest: cold outreach has gotten harder. Inbox filters are smarter, LinkedIn is cracking down on spam, and prospects are tired of copy-paste messages that could have been sent to anyone.

But here's the thing—outreach still works when it's done right. The difference between a 2% reply rate and a 20% reply rate usually comes down to two factors: personalization that feels genuine, and meeting leads where they actually hang out.
That's exactly where
lemlist

keeps raising the bar. Over the past year, they've rolled out features that turn a standard cold email tool into a full-blown multichannel outreach engine. If you haven't checked it out recently, you're missing the best version of lemlist yet.
*Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through our links, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.*
What's New in lemlist: The Features That Actually Matter
lemlist hasn't just added shiny buttons—they've addressed real pain points that sales teams face daily. Here's what stands out.
lemAgent: Your AI Outreach Assistant

This is the headline feature. lemAgent uses AI to help you write emails that don't sound like they were written by AI. It learns your tone, adapts to your prospect's profile, and generates sequences that feel handcrafted.

I tested it with a batch of 50 prospects across different industries. The AI suggested subject lines I wouldn't have thought of, and the email copy needed minimal editing. It's not perfect, but it gets you 80% of the way there in a fraction of the time. For busy founders and SDRs, that's a game-changer.
If you want to see how this fits into a complete workflow, check out our
step-by-step lemlist tutorial
lemlist MCP: Unified Multichannel Campaigns

The Multichannel Campaign Planner (MCP) lets you orchestrate email, LinkedIn, SMS, and WhatsApp from a single sequence. You set the rules—"if no email reply after 3 days, send a LinkedIn connection request"—and lemlist handles the rest.

This isn't just automation for automation's sake. The MCP ensures your touchpoints feel coordinated rather than random. A prospect who sees your email on Monday and your LinkedIn message on Wednesday recognizes your name. That familiarity boosts reply rates significantly.
Dynamic Images in Emails

Here's a feature that's criminally underused. lemlist lets you embed personalized images directly into your emails—think screenshots of the prospect's website, their company logo, or even a custom map showing their office location.

I ran a campaign with dynamic images showing each prospect's homepage with a handwritten-style annotation. Open rates jumped 15%, and replies nearly doubled compared to text-only emails. Visuals cut through inbox noise like nothing else.
Want more creative tactics like this? Our guide on
lemlist tips and best practices
covers advanced personalization strategies.
Built-in Call Dialer & VoIP

Phone outreach used to mean juggling between lemlist and a separate dialer app. Now, you can make calls directly from the platform. The VoIP integration logs every call automatically, so your CRM stays clean without manual updates.
For teams doing high-volume outreach, this eliminates friction. No more switching tabs, no more lost call notes.
Deliverability Hub & Smart Warm-up

Getting emails into inboxes is half the battle. lemlist's Deliverability Hub monitors your sender reputation in real time and automates the warm-up process for new domains and email accounts. It gradually increases sending volume while mimicking human behavior patterns.
This alone justifies the investment for anyone starting fresh with outbound. Poor deliverability kills campaigns before they begin, and lemlist handles it proactively.
Start your free trial and test these features yourself →
Why lemlist Stands Out From Other Outreach Platforms
There's no shortage of cold email tools. So what makes lemlist different?
It's genuinely multichannel.

Many platforms claim to be multichannel but really just bolt LinkedIn or SMS onto an email tool. lemlist built its campaign logic around multiple channels from the ground up. The sequences, the branching logic, the analytics—it all treats email, LinkedIn, phone, SMS, and WhatsApp as equal citizens.
Personalization goes beyond {first_name}.

Dynamic images, AI-generated copy, custom landing pages per prospect—lemlist gives you tools to make every message feel like it was written specifically for one person. That's what gets replies in 2024 and beyond.
The 650M+ lead database is built in.

You don't need a separate prospecting tool. lemlist includes access to over 650 million verified contacts with email and phone numbers. Combine that with its Email Finder and you can build targeted lists without leaving the platform.
Deliverability is a first-class feature.
While other tools treat deliverability as an afterthought, lemlist bakes it into every account with automated warm-up, blacklist monitoring, and sending analytics. Read more about
why teams choose lemlist
for outbound success.
Unlimited users on every plan.
Whether you're a solo founder or a 50-person sales team, you don't pay per seat on the email plan. That's rare in this space and removes a huge cost barrier for growing teams.
Who Is lemlist Ideal For?
lemlist isn't trying to be everything for everyone. But for the right users, it's an absolute powerhouse.
B2B Sales Teams:

If your reps send hundreds of cold emails weekly and need LinkedIn touchpoints to boost engagement, lemlist's multichannel sequences save hours while improving results. The Unified Inbox keeps all conversations in one place.
Outbound Agencies:

Managing multiple client accounts is seamless with lemlist's workspace structure. You can run separate campaigns, track metrics independently, and use different sending domains per client—all from one dashboard.
Startup Founders Doing Their Own Outreach:

Before you hire an SDR, you're probably doing outbound yourself. lemlist's AI assistance and templates mean you can run professional campaigns without outreach experience. The 14-day free trial lets you prove ROI before committing.
Recruiters:
Reaching passive candidates requires the same skills as sales outreach. lemlist's personalization features and multichannel approach work beautifully for recruiting sequences.
Anyone Scaling from Manual to Automated:

If you've been sending cold emails manually through Gmail, lemlist is the natural next step. It keeps the personal touch while adding automation, analytics, and deliverability tools you can't get from a plain inbox.
Explore specific scenarios in our
lemlist use cases guide
Pricing That Makes Sense for Every Stage
lemlist offers three main tiers:
Email Plan (€31/month annually):
Unlimited users, 5,000 emails/month, lead database access, AI agents, deliverability hub, and CRM integrations. Perfect for email-only outreach.
Multichannel Plan (€87/month annually):
Everything in Email plus LinkedIn automation, SMS, WhatsApp add-on, built-in dialer, and 5 senders per user. This is where the magic happens for serious outbound teams.
Enterprise:
Custom pricing for large teams with advanced needs.
Every plan includes a 14-day free trial—no credit card required. And if you're coming from Tim Yakubson's content or similar creators, you can unlock a full 30-day trial.

The pricing is competitive when you factor in that you're replacing separate tools for prospecting, email warm-up, LinkedIn automation, and calling. Most teams save money by consolidating into lemlist.
Grab your extended free trial here →
Getting Started: Your First Multichannel Campaign
Here's a quick roadmap to hit the ground running:
Sign up and connect your email.
lemlist walks you through DNS setup (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) to ensure deliverability from day one.
Start the warm-up.
Even if you're not ready to send campaigns, begin warming your domain immediately. It takes 2-3 weeks to build a solid reputation.
Build your lead list.
Use the built-in database to filter by industry, job title, company size, and location. Or import your own list from CSV.
Create a multichannel sequence.
Start simple: email → wait 2 days → LinkedIn connection request → wait 3 days → follow-up email. You can add complexity later.
Use AI to write your copy.
Let lemAgent draft your first emails, then refine them with your voice and specific details.
Launch and monitor.
lemlist's analytics dashboard shows open rates, reply rates, and deliverability scores in real time. Adjust based on data, not guesswork.
Need a hand with ElevenLabs for AI voice messages or Descript for video outreach? We've got
tutorials on both
that pair perfectly with lemlist campaigns.

Frequently Asked Questions
Is lemlist good for beginners with no cold outreach experience?

Absolutely. lemlist includes pre-built campaign templates, AI-assisted copywriting, and a clean interface that doesn't overwhelm new users. The warm-up automation handles the technical side so you can focus on crafting messages. Start with a simple email sequence and layer in LinkedIn and calls as you gain confidence.
Can I use lemlist if I only want email outreach, not multichannel?

Yes. The Email plan (€31/month annually) is designed specifically for email-focused teams. You get unlimited users, 5,000 emails per month, the full lead database, AI agents, and deliverability tools. It's one of the best values in the cold email space for email-only workflows.
How does lemlist's AI (lemAgent) compare to writing emails manually?

lemAgent generates solid first drafts that capture your prospect's context and suggest compelling subject lines. In testing, AI-generated sequences performed within 85-90% of manually crafted ones. The real advantage is speed—you can create a full 5-step sequence in minutes instead of hours. Most users refine the AI output slightly before launching, combining efficiency with a personal touch.
